DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARK L. HEJINIAN OF COBLENTZ PATCH DUFFY & BASS LLP, TEL. NO. 772-5713 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - DEFENDANTS ROBERT WOODS AND PALLADIAN CAPITAL ADVISORS, LLC's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled as moot. Plaintiff North Chute Ventures, LLC ("Plaintiff") has standing to maintain this action. On May 6, 2014, Plaintiff registered as a Foreign Limited Liability Company with the California Secretary of State. (Plaintiff's Req. Jud. Notice, p. 2:1-5.) The requests for judicial notice are granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/MJM

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. MARK L. HEJINIAN OF COBLENTZ PATCH DUFFY & BASS LLP, TEL. NO. 772-5713 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS ROBERT WOODS AND PALLADIAN CAPITAL ADVISORS, LLC's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Denied as moot. Plaintiff North Chute Ventures, LLC ("Plaintiff") has standing to maintain this action. On May 6, 2014, Plaintiff registered as a Foreign Limited Liability Company with the California Secretary of State. (Plaintiff's Req. Jud. Notice, p. 2:1-5.) The requests for judicial notice are granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jun-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT STRATEGOS REALTY CAPITAL, LLC's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is Granted. A foreign corporation may be served the summons by any means available pursuant to CCP 413.10. (Corp. Code 17701.16(a).) Defendant Strategos Realty Capital, LLC 's ("Strategos") corporate status is revoked by the Nevada Secretary of State. (Hejinan Decl., Exhibit A.) Plaintiffs have not demonstrated that service was properly effectuated on Defendant Strategos pursuant to CCP 416.20. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.)
Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/MJM)
